mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_SALE_ORDER (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_SALE_NO, I_SALE_TYPE, S_CUSTOMER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_STATUS, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_SHIP_TIME, D_EXPECT_DELIVERY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sSaleNo}, #{iSaleType}, #{sCustomerId}, #{sWarehouseId}, #{iStatus}, #{iTotalAmount}, #{dtShipTime}, #{dExpectDelivery}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_NO, I_SALE_TYPE, S_CUSTOMER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_STATUS, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_SHIP_TIME, D_EXPECT_DELIVERY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SALE_ORDER WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_NO, I_SALE_TYPE, S_CUSTOMER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_STATUS, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_SHIP_TIME, D_EXPECT_DELIVERY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SALE_ORDER
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_NO, I_SALE_TYPE, S_CUSTOMER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_STATUS, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_SHIP_TIME, D_EXPECT_DELIVERY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SALE_ORDER WHERE I_SALE_TYPE = 1 AND I_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY D_EXPECT_DELIVERY ASC
